name: Centennial Park (Cortez Pickleball Courts)
description: Come play pickleball at Centennial Park (Cortez Pickleball Courts) in Cortez, CO! There are 7 outdoor hard and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Cortez Recreation Center
description: Cortez Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Cortez, CO. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.
